entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 13
entries.excerpt: “And there was a strife between the herdmen of Abram’s cattle and the herdmen of Lot’s cattle” (Gen 13:7). For this, Lot’s quarrelsome servants were by God’s justice sent to the Sodomites, who were also quarrelsome, that with them they too might bear the punishment, while Lot God plucked out from their midst. Although God promised that land to Abram, He allowed Lot to choose for himself the land by the Jordan, that is, all the land of Sodom through which the Jordan flowed.…
